scripts.build: npm -w apps/backend run build && npm -w apps/admin run build && npm -w apps/web run build
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm -w apps/backend run dev" "npm -w apps/admin run dev" "npm -w apps/web run dev"
scripts.typecheck: npm -w apps/backend run typecheck && npm -w apps/admin run typecheck && npm -w apps/web run typecheck
